evidence: Browser click changed the selected operational row to aria-pressed=true.
Browser click moved the pressed section state from Hoje to Prioridades.
Browser click focused Buscar but produced no state, overlay, navigation, or callback evidence.

notes: Canonical browser review compared directly with the assigned source image; no blocking overlap, overflow, broken media, or composition divergence observed.
Responsive defects and dead global actions were fixed and reverified at 1672x941, 1448x1086, and 390x844.
Compared directly with the assigned source at 1672x941; drawer, responsive layouts, checklist, footer actions, global actions, and open-close behavior were verified after fixes.
Critical state compared directly with the assigned source and verified across canonical, reduced desktop, mobile, navigation, global actions, row selection, and drawer behavior.

The story now renders the full official Today dashboard plus ActivityFeed and starts at the canonical scroll position; filters, export, item open, shell navigation, global actions, and drawer behavior were verified.
Canonical DOM geometry contains all five 210px lanes inside the 1448px viewport; mobile horizontal overflow remains confined to official scroll regions.
Desktop drawer matches the 403px source placement; mobile drawer is a 375x844 fixed full-viewport surface with all seven footer actions verified.
Worklist geometry matches the 1448px source; row selection now updates every drawer context field and activity section; mobile drawers use the official full-viewport overlay contract.
Checklist selection now updates title, facts, status, progress, steps, activity, and comment; all drawer actions and mobile full-viewport overlay verified.
Revisão humana corrigiu callbacks oficiais do composer, contexto dinâmico por conversa e responsividade/colisões da família ThreePane no mobile.
Revisão humana corrigiu ações globais com drawer, detalhe dinâmico por decisão, sidebar ativa, superfície/fluxo mobile do ApprovalDrawer e rolagem horizontal da ApprovalTable.
Revisão humana tornou período, filtros, mini calendário, filas, eventos e drawer contextuais; corrigiu superfície opaca do ClassDrawer no mobile e quebra responsiva da PageFilterBar.
Revisão humana tornou o StudentDrawer contextual por aluno, ligou shell/filtros/segmentos/tabela/paginação/ações e corrigiu superfície e tabela no mobile.
Revisão humana ligou todos os callbacks do perfil, corrigiu overflow intrínseco no desktop e tornou cabeçalho, abas, métricas e painel lateral responsivos no mobile.

Revisao humana ligou shell, cabecalho, detalhe, alunos e chamada; habilitou opcoes de aluno; corrigiu sobreposicao do cabecalho, clipping do painel e a composicao responsiva do detalhe, roster e footer no mobile.
Human review connected shell/header/filter/priority/queue actions and promoted the official finance-overview responsive dashboard variant.
